---
title: Edge Computing in IoT
author: IoTWeekly
date: 2024-02-23
description: Processing data at the edge reduces latency and bandwidth costs
tags: ["#edge", "#iot"]
---
Processing data at the edge reduces latency and bandwidth costs. Instead of sending everything to the cloud, let devices make local decisions.

Modern edge platforms like EdgeX Foundry make this accessible to small teams.
